about_accuracy_first_description: We use industry-standard formulas and rigorous testing to ensure every calculation is precise and reliable.
about_content_experts_description: Our team includes content strategists, AI engineers, and social media experts with deep experience in viral content.
about_content_intelligence_description_1: Our AI analyzes viral reels using proven engagement patterns and psychological triggers. Every analysis is grounded in real performance data from millions of views.
about_content_intelligence_description_2: We understand that content creation requires strategy. That's why we've built a platform that creators and marketers trust. From hook analysis to full script generation, our tools provide the insights you need.
about_content_intelligence_description_3: Whether you're a content creator building an audience, a marketer driving engagement, or a brand growing reach, ReelStudio provides the data-driven insights you need to succeed.
about_continuous_improvement_description: We regularly update our AI models and features based on the latest viral trends and user feedback.
about_customer_focused_description: We listen to our users and continuously improve based on feedback and real-world usage patterns.
about_join_thousands: Join thousands of creators who trust ReelStudio to grow their audience.
about_mission_paragraph_1: At ReelStudio, we believe every creator deserves to understand why content goes viral. Whether you're building a personal brand, growing a business, or creating for passion, our AI-powered insights help you create content that performs.
about_mission_paragraph_2: We combine cutting-edge AI with proven engagement patterns to deliver insights that creators trust. Our commitment to accuracy, privacy, and user experience drives everything we do.
about_security_privacy_description: Your content data is encrypted and secure. We never share your generated content with third parties.
about_technology_leaders_description: Built with modern technology and best practices to ensure reliability, security, and performance.
about_user_centric_description: Every feature is designed with our users in mind. We prioritize ease of use and professional results.
accessibility_commitment_text: ReelStudio is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We continually improve the user experience for everyone and apply relevant accessibility standards.
accessibility_feedback_text: We welcome feedback on the accessibility of ReelStudio. If you experience barriers not listed above, please contact us:
accessibility_known_1: Some complex studio input forms may benefit from improved screen-reader guidance — in progress.
accessibility_known_2: Manual testing with assistive technologies (NVDA, VoiceOver) is ongoing.
accessibility_known_issues_text: We are aware of the following areas that may not yet fully meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards and are actively working to resolve them:
accessibility_last_reviewed: This statement was last reviewed on February 21, 2026.
accessibility_measure_1: Semantic HTML elements used throughout the application
accessibility_measure_2: Keyboard navigation supported across all interactive elements
accessibility_measure_3: Sufficient colour contrast ratios (minimum 4.5:1 for normal text)
accessibility_measure_4: ARIA labels and roles applied to complex components
accessibility_measure_5: Focus indicators visible on all interactive elements
accessibility_measure_6: Lighthouse accessibility audits run during CI/CD pipeline
accessibility_measures_text: ReelStudio takes the following measures to ensure accessibility:
accessibility_response_time: We aim to respond to accessibility feedback within 5 business days.
accessibility_standard_text: We aim to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA. These guidelines explain how to make web content more accessible to people with disabilities.

api_documentation_description: Complete API documentation for ReelStudio. This page is under construction.
api_endpoint_delete_desc: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and all associated data.
api_endpoint_export_data_desc: Downloads all personal data for the authenticated user as a JSON file (GDPR Article 20 — right to data portability).
api_endpoint_export_desc: Exports a saved calculation result as PDF or CSV. Pass the calculation ID and desired format.
api_endpoint_history_desc: Returns your paginated calculation history. Supports ?page=, ?limit=, and ?type= query parameters.
api_endpoint_object_desc: Records the user's objection to marketing or analytics processing (GDPR Article 21 — right to object). Pass { processingType: 'marketing' | 'analytics' | 'all' }.
api_endpoint_profile_desc: Returns the authenticated user's profile information.
api_endpoint_usage_desc: Returns your current usage statistics and remaining quota for the billing period.
api_error_429: 429 Too Many Requests — Rate limit exceeded
api_error_500: 500 Internal Server Error — Unexpected server error

contact_description: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact_form_description: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours
cookies_analytics_text: Help us understand how visitors interact with ReelStudio (page views, performance metrics, feature usage). All data is anonymised and used only to improve the product.
cookies_changes_text: We may update this policy as our use of cookies evolves. Material changes will be communicated via email or an in-app notice.
cookies_consent_message: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and protect your account. We also use analytics cookies to improve ReelStudio.
cookies_contact_text: For questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at
cookies_control_text: You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling essential cookies will prevent you from signing in or using core features.
cookies_essential_text: Required for the site to function. These include session management, CSRF protection, and authentication tokens. You cannot opt out of these.
cookies_functional_text: Remember your preferences such as theme (light/dark mode) and language settings. Disabling them may affect your experience.
cookies_third_party_text: Our payment processor (Stripe) and authentication provider (Firebase/Google) may set their own cookies governed by their respective privacy policies.
cookies_what_are_text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences, keep you signed in, and understand how you use ReelStudio so we can improve it.
errors_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
faq_cant_find: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.
faq_how_does_it_work_answer: Faq How Does It Work Answer
faq_metadata_description: Find answers to common questions about ReelStudio, subscriptions, and features.
faq_subscriptions_change: Can I change my plan later?
faq_subscriptions_exceed: What happens if I exceed my calculation limit?
features_access_description: Use ReelStudio on any device - desktop, tablet, or mobile. All calculations sync across your devices automatically.
features_description: Professional-grade tools with industry-standard formulas, detailed reporting, and flexible export options.
features_export_description: Export your calculations in PDF, Excel, CSV, or via API. Choose the format that works best for your workflow.
features_history_description: Access your complete calculation history. Review past calculations, export reports, and track your financial planning over time.
features_platform_description: Powerful tools and capabilities that make ReelStudio the best choice for content intelligence
features_ready_description: Start your 14-day free trial and experience all these features today.
features_secure_description: Bank-level encryption ensures your financial data remains secure. We never share your calculations with third parties.
features_title: Everything You Need to Create Viral Content with Confidence
home_benefits_accurate_description: Stop guessing. Know exactly what hooks, formats, and triggers drive engagement
home_benefits_export_description: Go from scroll to publish-ready script in seconds, not hours
home_benefits_secure_description: Deep-dive into any niche: finance, fitness, business, lifestyle, and more
home_cta_description: Join thousands of creators who use ReelStudio to build content strategies that actually work. Start free today.
home_features_analyze_description: Decode why reels go viral: hook patterns, triggers, format, and CTA
home_features_description: Powerful AI tools to discover, analyze, and generate content that performs
home_features_discover_description: Scan any niche and surface top-performing reels by engagement and views
home_features_generate_description: Generate hooks, captions, and scripts from viral reels instantly
home_features_queue_description: Organize, schedule, and publish your content to Instagram
home_features_title: Everything You Need to Create Viral Content
home_hero_description: Discover what makes viral reels perform, decode the strategy, and generate content that grows your audience. Trusted by thousands of creators worldwide.
home_hero_footer: ✨ No credit card required • Cancel anytime • 14-day money-back guarantee
metadata_accessibility_description: ReelStudio's commitment to digital accessibility and WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for all users.
metadata_admin_subscriptions_description: Manage subscriptions, view analytics, and handle subscription-related operations
metadata_cookies_description: Learn how ReelStudio uses cookies and similar technologies to provide a better experience.
order_detail_help_description: If you have any questions about your order, please contact our support team.
order_detail_pdf_appreciation: We appreciate your business and trust in our professional studio services.
payment_cancel_cancel_anytime_descriptio: You can cancel your subscription at any time with no penalties or fees.
payment_cancel_free_trial_description: Try ReelStudio risk-free for 14 days. No credit card required to start.
payment_cancel_guarantee_description: Not satisfied? Get a full refund within 14 days of purchase.
payment_fallback_auth_required: Authentication required. Please sign in and try again.
payment_fallback_error_network: Network connection error. Please check your internet connection.
payment_fallback_error_payment_service: Payment service error. Please try again.
payment_fallback_error_timeout: Request timed out. This may be due to slow network or server issues.
payment_fallback_error_unavailable_items: Some items are no longer available.
payment_fallback_invalid_order_format: Invalid order data format. Please try again from the checkout page.
payment_fallback_missing_order_data: No order data provided. Redirecting to checkout...
payment_fallback_security_notice: 🔒 Your payment information is secure and encrypted
payment_never_store_card: We never store your card details
pricing_description: Choose the plan that's right for you. All plans include a 14-day free trial with full access.
pricing_faq_cancel_answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period.
pricing_faq_change_plan_answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time through the Manage Subscription button in your account settings. This opens the Stripe Customer Portal where you can change your plan. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.
pricing_faq_exceed_limit_answer: If you exceed your monthly calculation limit, you'll need to wait until the next billing cycle or upgrade to a higher tier. Enterprise plans have unlimited calculations.
pricing_faq_free_trial_answer: Yes! All plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start your trial.
pricing_faq_payment_methods: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing_faq_payment_methods_answer: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and ACH transfers through our secure payment processor.
pricing_faq_refunds_answer: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, contact us within 14 days of your purchase for a full refund.
privacy_contact_text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at
privacy_data_security_text: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest.
privacy_information_collect_text: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, and payment details when you use our services. We also collect non-personal information such as browser type and usage data.
privacy_introduction_text: We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you use ReelStudio services.
shared_footer_admin_error_verifying: Error verifying admin code. Please try again.

admin_verify_invalid_code: Invalid admin code. Please try again.
admin_verify_error_verifying: Error verifying admin code. Please try again.
admin_verify_footer_note: This area is restricted to authorized administrators only.
studio_canvas_noReel: Select a reel from the sidebar
studio_canvas_noReelSub: Search a niche and pick a viral reel to analyze
studio_features_analysis_description: Get comprehensive insights into why content goes viral. Our AI analyzes hooks, storytelling patterns, emotional triggers, and engagement factors to give you actionable intelligence.
studio_features_analysis_feature_1: Hook strength analysis and opening 3-second optimization
studio_features_analysis_feature_2: Emotional trigger identification and psychological pattern mapping
studio_features_analysis_feature_3: Story structure breakdown and narrative arc analysis
studio_features_analysis_feature_4: Audio-visual synchronization and pacing optimization insights
studio_features_analysis_feature_5: Competitive benchmarking and performance prediction modeling
studio_features_discover_description: Search our extensive database of viral reels across every niche. Filter by engagement rate, view count, and content type to find the perfect inspiration for your next creation.
studio_features_discover_feature_1: Real-time viral trend tracking across all platforms
studio_features_discover_feature_2: Advanced filtering by niche, engagement, and performance metrics
studio_features_discover_feature_4: Save and organize favorite reels to inspiration boards
studio_features_discover_feature_5: Competitor analysis and content gap identification
studio_features_generation_description: Transform analysis into action with our AI-powered content generator. Create scripts, variations, and completely new content based on proven viral patterns and your unique style.
studio_features_generation_feature_1: Script generation with multiple format options (reels, stories, posts)
studio_features_generation_feature_2: Content variation engine for A/B testing and platform optimization
studio_features_generation_feature_4: Voice tone and personality customization for brand consistency
studio_features_generation_feature_5: Multi-platform content adaptation (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)
studio_features_pillars_description: ReelStudio is built on four core pillars that work together to transform your content creation process from idea to viral success.
studio_features_queue_description: Plan, schedule, and automate your content strategy. Our intelligent queue system helps you maintain consistent posting schedules and maximize engagement across all platforms.
studio_features_queue_feature_1: Automated posting schedule optimization based on audience activity
studio_features_queue_feature_3: Batch processing and bulk content upload capabilities
studio_features_queue_feature_4: Performance tracking and automatic content recycling

studio_chat_deleteProjectDescription: This will permanently delete the project and all its chat sessions. This action cannot be undone.

support_billing_answer: Monthly plans are charged on the same date each month. Annual plans are charged once per year. Your first charge occurs after the 14-day free trial ends.
support_change_plan: How do I change or cancel my plan?
support_change_plan_answer: Go to Account → Subscription → Manage Plan. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel at any time. Access continues until the end of the current billing period.
support_description: Get help and support for ReelStudio. This page is under construction.
support_export_answer: After running a calculation, click the Export button in the results panel. PDF and CSV formats are available depending on your plan.
support_export_question: How do I export calculation results?
support_faq_link: Visit our FAQ page for common questions
support_reach_out: Our support team is here for you. Reach out and we'll respond as quickly as possible.
support_reset_answer: Click "Forgot password?" on the sign-in page. A reset link will be sent to your registered email address.
support_reset_question: I forgot my password — how do I reset it?
support_step_choose_plan: Choose a plan (or start your 14-day free trial)
terms_acceptance_text: By using ReelStudio services, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms_contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at
terms_limitation_text: ReelStudio provides AI-powered content intelligence for informational purposes. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use our services, except as required by law. Generated content should be reviewed before publishing.
terms_subscription_access: Access continues until end of billing period after cancellation
terms_subscription_text: Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually based on your selected plan. You can cancel your subscription at any time.
terms_subscription_trial: 14-day free trial available for all plans
terms_user_accounts_text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information and for all activities that occur under your account.
